creator: rtomimbang@math.upd.edu.ph
text:

How-To-Repeat: actually it's not a bug per se. its more of a problem i have with my
new laptop a Compaq C551UT model with a BROADCOM 802.11 b/g wireless
device, that is not properly detected by FreeBSD6.2.  I hope your
development team can find a way to help those similar individuals working
very hard to have a healthy BSD installation on their laptops.  Especially
a work around on such problems. Thanks and more power!  Oh yeah, google
doesn't help at all with this type of problems on wireless issues
especially on Unix systems. Cheers!!!
